name: Chunky Beef Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Beef chuck, boneless, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
6 ounces Tomato paste, in a can
1/2 teaspoon Grated red pepper flakes, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add beef, onion, green pepper, and garlic; cook until beef is evenly browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour off any drippings.
4. Sprinkle salt over the beef.
5. Add tomatoes with juice, tomato paste, chili powder, oregano, and crushed red pepper flakes.
6. Cover tightly and reduce heat to low-medium; simmer for 1 1/2 hours until beef is tender.
7. Serve with a choice of toppings. Makes 8 cups.
